The 27000 strike is the primary intraday anchor due to massive Call OI and volume. Structural support is heavily defined by the 26700 Monthly Call Wall and the multi-expiry 26000 Put confluence.

levels.motivazione: Monumental Monthly Call OI (3784) sits below spot. Positive GEX means dealers will aggressively buy dips and sell rips around this level, creating a magnetic support floor.

Heavy Call OI in both MONTHLY (416) and WEEKLY (98) creates a solid structural ceiling well above the spot price.
0DTE Max Pain is located significantly below the current spot price, acting as a gravitational anchor for the daily expiration.

Notable 0DTE Call OI (69) with extremely high volume (2627) highlights a very active intraday friction level just below the main 27000 wall.
